_description: Track A evergreen seed keywords backed by real campaign performance data (TRZ). These should always be included in pipeline runs regardless of trending topics.

seeds.notes: Brand + insurance comparison. High RPC, moderate volume. Sam's Club example: 16,332 CPM, $39,780 revenue.
Shorter brand+product query, highest RPC in dataset. Sam's Car Insurance: 5,376 CPM, $17,106 revenue.
Cross-sell insurance bundles. Lower volume but strong RPC. Multi Insurance Car and Home: 3,280 CPM, $8,500 revenue.
Military/veteran audience targets. Very high RPC despite lower volume. Military Insurance Discounts: 1,409 CPM, $4,245 revenue.
Senior-targeted insurance queries. Low volume but high RPC. AARP Homeowners Insurance for Seniors: 1,535 CPM, $3,987 revenue.

examples: Ssi Apartments for Rent Near Me
seeds.notes: Highest volume keyword in dataset: 58,596 CPM. Low RPC but massive scale. SSI Apartments for Rent Near Me: $34,487 revenue. This vertical is volume-driven, not RPC-driven.

seeds.pattern: apartments that accept disability near me
examples: Apartments that Accept Disability Near Me
Apartments that Accept SSI Near Me
Housing for Disabled Adults Near Me
seeds.notes: Disability housing intent, peak RPC in government_benefits vertical. Apartments that Accept Disability Near Me: 9,622 CPM, $5,880 revenue.

examples: How to Get a Housing Voucher Immediately
How to Apply for Section 8 Housing Voucher
How to Get a HUD Voucher
seeds.notes: High-intent government housing assistance queries. How to Get a Housing Voucher Immediately: 8,594 CPM, $5,194 revenue.

examples: Affordable Housing Near Me Income Based
seeds.notes: Broad low-income housing queries. Lower RPC but substantial volume. Income Based Apartments Near Me: 11,667 CPM, $4,340 revenue.
Free medical supply queries get strong RPC — insurance-funded fulfillment. Free Ostomy Covers: 2,895 CPM, $6,602 revenue.

examples: Laser Eye Bag Removal Near Me
seeds.notes: Local medical/cosmetic procedure intent. Laser Eye Bag Removal Near Me: 6,008 CPM, $4,187 revenue. Strong local commercial signal.

examples: Whole House Generator Cost with Installation
Whole House Air Purifier Cost with Installation
Whole House Water Filter Cost with Installation
Whole House Solar Cost with Installation
seeds.notes: High-ticket home service cost research queries. Whole House Generator Cost with Installation: 8,296 CPM, $4,723 revenue.
Year-anchored deal queries work well in AU. 2 for 1 River Cruise Deals 2026: 6,743 CPM, $4,425 revenue. Strong for AU travel vertical.
Italian adult education queries (degree programs for working professionals). Laurea in Medicina Per Lavoratori: 4,517 CPM, $4,563 revenue. Strong IT education vertical.
